title: `buildah manifest` commands `--annotation` flags split on commas
body:
### Issue Description

Many of the buildah and podman commands treat `--annotation` as a single annotation, properly handling commas and other characters, but `buildah manifest` commands still split on commas.

### Steps to reproduce the issue

In a directory with a Containerfile:

```sh
$ buildah build --annotation=foo=bar '--annotation=alpha=beta, gamma, and delta' -t localhost/this/test:version1
STEP 1/5: FROM docker.io/python:3.14-slim-trixie
...

$ buildah manifest create --annotation=foo=bar '--annotation=alpha=beta, gamma, and delta' localhost/this/test:version1
Error: no "=" found in annotation " gamma"
```

### Describe the results you received

An error.

### Describe the results you expected

No error.

### buildah version output

```yaml
Version:         1.43.0
Go Version:      go1.25.6 X:nodwarf5
Image Spec:      1.1.1
Runtime Spec:    1.2.1
CNI Spec:        1.1.0
libcni Version:
image Version:   5.39.1
Git Commit:
Built:           Mon Feb  9 03:49:51 2026
OS/Arch:         linux/amd64
BuildPlatform:   linux/amd64
```


### Provide your storage.conf

```toml
[storage]
driver = "overlay"
runroot = "/run/containers/storage"
graphroot = "/var/lib/containers/storage"
[storage.options]
additionalimagestores = [
"/usr/lib/containers/storage",
]
[storage.options.pull_options]
[storage.options.overlay]
mountopt = "nodev,metacopy=on"
```

### Upstream Latest Release

Yes

### Additional environment details

_No response_

### Additional information

This is also happening as of the latest `main` branch commit.

comments.body: A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
